properties.sql.select_statement: SELECT PK_VALUE, CS_VALUE AS CS_CURRENT FROM #PM_CHK_SCHEMA#.#PM_CHK_TABLE#

whereProperties.where: CS_CURRENT IS NULL OR CS_CURRENT <> CS_VALUE

pipelines.description: Short description: DIMENSION RECONCILIATION FRAMEWORK COMPONENT FOR DATASTAGE. Long description: Job to reconciliate records in a type "2" dimension.

comments.content: DIMENSION RECONCILIATION FRAMEWORK COMPONENT FOR DATASTAGE

Calculate counter for input rows
and join concatenated primary key

local_parameters.name: PM_SURROGATE_BLOCK
local_parameters.prompt: Target table surrogate key block size

local_parameters.name: PM_RECORD_COUNT
local_parameters.description: May be 0 for a single transaction or not 0 for multiple transactions

local_parameters.name: PM_APP_UPDATE
local_parameters.value: UPDATE DIL_EGS_ADD.CSI_CTB_POC_DS SET DENDTMS = ORCHESTRATE.DENDTMS, LTST_FLG = \'N\' WHERE GNUMCTB = ORCHESTRATE.GNUMCTB AND DBEGTMS < ORCHESTRATE.DBEGTMS AND LTST_FLG = \'Y\'

local_parameters.name: $APT_RECORD_COUNTS
local_parameters.description: Causes the framework to print, for each operator Player, the number of records consumed by getRecord() and produced by putRecord().

local_parameters.name: $APT_DISABLE_COMBINATION
local_parameters.description: Prevents operators from being combined into one process.

local_parameters.name: $OSH_PRINT_SCHEMAS
local_parameters.description: Causes Parallel job to print the record schema of all data sets and the interface schema of all operators.
